eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Armstrong, TX; at 03:40 PM ON MAY 15, 2026 Effective until 04:10 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Armstrong County Emergency Management: A fire warning has been issued for this area. There are multiple dangerous wildfires in Western Armstrong County. Smoke and fire will present a threat to life and property. Be prepared to evacuate.
